data.title: Regency Centers prices $450M senior unsecured notes w/ 4.50% coupon, due March 15, 2033; issued at 99.376% of par value.
data.description: Regency Centers Corporation, based in Jacksonville, Florida, publicly announced a $450 million offering of senior unsecured notes due 2033 through its operating partnership, Regency Centers, L.P. The issuance was made under an existing shelf registration filed with the SEC. Priced at 99.376% of par value, the Notes carry a 4.50% coupon rate, with semiannual interest payments due on September 15 and March 15 each year. The first payment is scheduled for September 15, 2026. The Company will provide a guarantee for the payment of both principal and interest on the Notes.

data.title: Fed Governor Michael Barr warns AI is displacing young US workers in highly exposed roles like software development. Job creation near zero, unemployment rate rising, labor market vulnerability. AI driving productivity growth.
data.description: Fed Governor Michael Barr highlighted concerns about artificial intelligence impacting the job market, particularly affecting entry-level positions in sectors like software development and customer service. Job creation has been minimal, and the labor force growth has stagnated with unemployment rates at concerning levels. Barr warned that these conditions make the labor market susceptible to negative impacts in the future. Barr emphasized the significant impact of AI on the job market, likening it to pivotal technologies like the steam engine and the personal computer, which drove productivity and living standards. He also pointed out the potential risks associated with technological advancements. The full article provides detailed insights and analysis on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Jade A. Starry named Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for contributions to Maternal and Newborn Care.
data.description: In Lewiston, Idaho, on February 18, 2026, Jade A. Starry has been recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in The Inner Circle for her significant contributions to Maternal and Newborn Care. With a successful career, Jade A. Starry has become a prominent figure in the field.

data.title: American Water Works Co (NYSE: AWK) Q4 earnings missed estimates by -3.94%. Revenue increased by $70 million.
data.description: American Water Works Co (NYSE: AWK) released its Q4 earnings on February 18, 2026, at 04:30 PM. The company reported an EPS of $1.22, falling short of the estimated $1.27 by -3.94%. Revenue showed a significant increase of $70.00 million compared to the corresponding period in the previous year. For more detailed historical earnings information, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Iris Acquisition Corp II to start separate trading of Class A shares & warrants on Feb 24, 2026 (NYSE: IRAB U).
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on February 18, 2026, Iris Acquisition Corp II (NYSE: IRAB U) revealed that starting from February 24, 2026, holders of the units from its initial public offering can choose to independently trade the Company’s Class A ordinary shares and warrants included in the units.

data.title: Brown-Forman (NYSE: BFA, BFB) declares $0.2310/share quarterly cash dividend, payable on April 1, 2026.
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky, the renowned Brown-Forman Corporation revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a standard quarterly cash dividend of $0.2310 per share for both its Class A and Class B Common Stock. This dividend will be disbursed on April 1, 2026, to shareholders listed on the records as of March 9, 2026. Brown-Forman, recognized as a part of the esteemed S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats index, has been consistently providing regular quarterly cash dividends for an impressive 82 years. Furthermore, the company has managed to boost its cash dividend for 42 consecutive years.

data.title: Versant Media Group to present at Deutsche Bank conference on March 10, 2026 at 11:40 a.m. ET in Palm Beach, FL.
data.description: Versant Media Group, Inc. disclosed that Anand Kini, the COO and CFO, will be speaking at Deutsche Bank’s 34th Annual Media, Internet & Telecom Conference in Palm Beach, FL on March 10, 2026, at 11:40 a.m. ET. The presentation can be viewed live on Versant Media's Investor Relations site at investors.versantmedia.com. Following the event, a replay of the webcast will also be accessible on the same website. The company's stock ticker is NASDAQ: VSNT.

data.title: DigitalBridge to sell stake in Netomnia, serving 3M+ UK premises. Advencap and Soho Square Capital also involved.
data.description: A global alternative asset manager, DigitalBridge (NYSE: DBRG), in partnership with Advencap and Soho Square Capital, has finalized an agreement to sell Substantial Group, the owner of UK-based wholesale full fiber operator Netomnia. Netomnia, established in 2019, now caters to over 3 million locations in the UK.

data.title: Lincoln Electric declares dividend of $0.79 per share, payable on April 15 to shareholders of record on March 31, 2026.
data.description: In Cleveland, Lincoln Electric Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: LECO) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.79 per common share. The payment is scheduled for April 15, 2026, and will be distributed to shareholders recorded as of March 31, 2026. Lincoln Electric is established as a proficient industrial machinery and technology provider, aiding clients in producing and upholding critical equipment and infrastructure. Through their groundbreaking approaches, Lincoln Electric facilitates improved quality and productivity.

data.title: Navan study finds 42% of European travel managers struggle to access data; only 16% using it effectively.
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, Navan, a global AI-powered business travel and expense platform trading on NASDAQ under the ticker NAVN, unveiled a new study titled "5 Ways to Uplevel Travel Management". The report highlights that 42% of European travel managers face challenges in accessing necessary data. Developed in collaboration with temoji, the study of 120 corporate travel managers exposes that although there is an abundance of data available, only 16% believe they are effectively utilizing it to achieve optimal outcomes.

data.title: Wyndham Hotels & Resorts increased quarterly dividend by 5%, reported 4% system-wide room growth, 870 development contracts globally, and 3% development pipeline growth. Full-year 2025 showed a 31% decrease in diluted EPS to $2.50 but a 6% increase in adjusted diluted EPS to $4.58. The company provided an outlook for full-year 2026 with rooms growth of 4% - 4.5% and global RevPAR growth of (1.5%) - 0.5%. Cash flow from operations was $367 million in 2025. Shareholders received $393 million through repurchases and dividends. Board authorized a 5% increase in quarterly dividend to $0.43 per share. Net income decreased by 33% to $193 million in 2025. The financial report included non-GAAP measures for easier comparison. The full press release gives extensive financial details and future outlook of the company.
data.description: Wyndham Hotels & Resorts announced a 5% increase in quarterly dividend to $0.43/share starting in Q1 2026. In full-year 2025, they reported a 4% year-over-year growth in system-wide rooms, awarded 870 development contracts globally (up 18% YOY), and achieved an all-time high in ancillary revenues with a 15% increase. However, full-year 2025 diluted EPS decreased by 31% to $2.50 due to non-cash impairments and other charges. Adjusted diluted EPS increased by 6% to $4.58. Net income decreased by 33% to $193 million, while adjusted net income increased by 2% to $353 million. Operating cash flow was $367 million, with adjusted free cash flow at $433 million. The company returned $393 million to shareholders through share repurchases and quarterly dividends. With a record 259,000 rooms in their development pipeline, they expect 4%-4.5% room growth in 2026. RevPAR showed declines in the U.S. and internationally for Q4 and full-year 2025. The Company shared financial details, including a net debt leverage ratio of 3.5 times and balance sheet totaling $64 million in cash and $840 million in total liquidity. They repurchased shares worth $266 million in 2025 and paid out $127 million in dividends. The Company will host a conference call on February 19, 2026, to discuss these results and future outlook. Exclusions in non-GAAP measures focus on illustrating period-over-period comparisons. The Company anticipates various potential factors for future adjustments and possible impacts on reported results.

data.title: 407 International Inc. saw a 6% traffic increase in 2025, with revenues at $2,008.5 million and net income at $810.5 million. They welcomed a new director and focused on community support. They invested $3.4 million in GTA communities and expanded their Route Relief Program for low-income drivers.
data.description: 407 International Inc. reported a successful financial year in 2025, with revenues reaching $2,008.5 million, a significant 18% increase from the previous year. Net income also rose by 17% to $810.5 million. EBITDA for the year totaled $1,686.9 million, up 14% from 2024. Average workday trips were 387,116, with a 6% increase in vehicle kilometers traveled and total trips from 2024. The Company welcomed Sebastian Berardi to the Board of Directors in February 2026. Beyond financial success, 407 ETR made significant impacts in the Greater Toronto Area, delivering $1.2 billion in annual socioeconomic benefits, supporting 1,800 full-time equivalent jobs, investing $3.4 million in communities through sponsorships and donations, and expanding their Route Relief Program to assist low-income drivers with up to eight free trips per month. The Company remains committed to providing a safe and reliable route for drivers in Ontario.

data.title: Macerich (MAC) beats Q4 earnings estimates by 166.67%, with $0.48 EPS vs $0.18 estimate. Revenue down $11.97M YoY.
data.description: Real estate investment trust company Macerich (NYSE: MAC) recently released its Q4 earnings on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, at 04:15 PM. In the report, Macerich surpassed estimated earnings significantly by 166.67%, with an EPS of $0.48 compared to the expected $0.18. However, the revenue dropped by $11.97 million compared to the previous year. It is worth noting that in the past, the company had outperformed estimates on EPS by $0.27. For further details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: OR Royalties Inc. declares US$0.055 per common share dividend for Q1 2026, payable on April 15 to shareholders of record.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, OR Royalties Inc. (OR: TSX & NYSE) disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a first quarter 2026 dividend of US$0.055 per common share. The dividend is scheduled for disbursement on April 15, 2026, to shareholders noted in records by the end of business on March 31, 2026. This dividend is classified as an "eligible dividend" as per the specifications outlined in the Income Tax Act (Canada).

data.title: Averin Capital Acquisition Corp. prices $250M IPO, offering 25M units at $10 each, to trade on Nasdaq under "ACAAU."
data.description: Averin Capital Acquisition Corp. has priced its initial public offering of 25,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share and one-sixth of a redeemable warrant, with a whole warrant allowing purchase of one share at $11.50 each. Upon listing on Nasdaq on February 19, 2026, under "ACAAU," the $10.00 per unit will be held in a trust account. Once trading separately, Class A shares and warrants will have symbols "ACAA" and "ACAAW." The offering is set to close on February 20, with underwriters granted a 45-day option to buy up to 3,750,000 additional units at IPO price to cover over-allotments.
